AI research board

The converter should survive new Lovable layouts without learning custom rules.

This fixture mixes editorial typography, utility-like classes, nested grids, image panels and generic wrappers so the pipeline must rely on rendered geometry and visible content instead of matching a single example site.

Generate board Open insights
12x More layout variants covered by render-first extraction.
99% Similarity target before structural output is accepted.
0 Hardcoded class or text assumptions required.

Rendered-first capture

Bounding boxes, buttons, text layers and assets are extracted after the page is visually ready, not from brittle source selectors.

See rendered view

Visual order

Children are grouped by on-screen order before any semantic reshaping happens.

Neutral containers

Complex Lovable bands stay generic instead of being forced into preset cards.

Safe fallback

Snapshot and pixel-perfect remain available when structure loses fidelity.
